name: claude-context
install_doc: README: `claude mcp add claude-context -e OPENAI_API_KEY=... -- npx -y @zilliz/claude-context-mcp`
notes: Semantic code search via embeddings. NON-OPERATIONAL in the default harness: verified 2026-06-13 that without OPENAI_API_KEY (and a Milvus/Zilliz vector DB) the MCP server never completes its handshake — stderr shows 'OpenAI API Key: ❌ Missing', stdout returns no tools. Its near-1.0 cost ratio therefore just reflects vanilla Claude Code with an inert server, NOT a real measurement of the tool. Excluded from the headline ranking and flagged as 'requires paid external services' unless an OPENAI_API_KEY + vector DB are provisioned. Embedding cost would also be external to total_cost_usd.
